name: RebarCranking
summary: The RebarCranking class represents the cranking of reinforcing bars at a RebarSplitter.

constructors.name: RebarCranking
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarCranking class.

properties.name: CrankedDistance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranked distance.

properties.name: CrankedLengthType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranked length type.

properties.name: CrankedOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranked offset.

properties.name: CrankedRatio
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranked ratio.

properties.name: CrankingType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cranking type.

properties.name: CrankRotation
properties.summary: Gets or sets the crank rotation.

properties.name: CrankSide
properties.summary: Gets or sets the crank side.

properties.name: CrankStraightLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the crank straight length.
